iDenfy was founded in 2017 in Kaunas, Lithuania. The platform covers identity verification via document-plus-liveness checks, business verification (KYB), and AML screening against sanctions, PEPs, and adverse media. iDenfy is one of the more transparent vendors on pricing — published plans and monthly subscriptions instead of only custom enterprise contracts.

The customer base skews toward European fintechs, crypto platforms, online marketplaces, and iGaming. Document coverage is broad with particular strength in EU documents.
